headline: Strategic angle — ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and governance reforms
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, DJSI, ESRS, S&P Global ESG frameworks triggered; SEBI deadlines and scrutiny apply.
Potential ESG score gap versus peers could trigger index exclusion and passive fund outflows.
Potential impact on talent acquisition and customer trust per Edelman Trust Barometer.
action: Initiate enhanced disclosure and investor communication to mitigate ESG rating and regulatory risks.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and governance reforms
